hard_rules: Do not put internal package/version workflow notes into news or changelog.
Do not put scribe/admin-only commands or hidden service tooling into public news.md.
Prefer ready changed files/archives over patch scripts when asked for archives.
Preserve current functionality unless explicitly asked to replace it.
For MVP Telegram bot, prefer long polling over webhook unless explicitly changed.
Do not make /start teleport existing characters; use explicit respawn/admin movement for relocation.
When adding admin/scribe commands, keep /adminHelp, /adminMenu and docs/systems/admin_commands.md complete.

terminology.Rest: Відпочити means brief rest, not sleep

constraints: prisma/seed.ts prefers prisma/data/world/ when it exists; do not change only the legacy fallback for live world edits
do not casually change z; Дрімотна Межа intentionally uses z = -13 for the tutorial dream
do not create duplicate exits in one direction

current_0_11_context: /look is Озирнутися / current місцина overview; /examine is Роздивитися / closer inspection.
Player-facing menus, help text and current docs should use /look; legacy location-overview aliases may stay in code only.
Ordinary UI should hide exact technical numbers unless local scribe/admin technical details are enabled.
Lit torches expire into twigs / хмиз, not dry torches.
Inspecting another character may show visible lit torches in hand(s); use Руки порожні only when no obvious held item is visible.
/chat supports time, location and character grouping modes in Telegram and web views.
хмиз now has a first fuel loop: it can extend burning ordinary campfires or prepare згаслі ordinary campfires for relighting.

Inventory now has first modest item actions: berries restore a small amount of stamina and ease hunger by a tiny amount, mushrooms ease hunger a little, herbs restore a small amount of HP when wounded, dry torches can be lit when fire is available, and resource stacks can be inspected or dropped.
current_0_12_context: Дрімотна Межа is the first dream tutorial region on z = -13.
New characters enter the dream after onboarding; existing /start must continue to preserve current location.
/sleep tutorial returns to the saved tutorial dream position; plain /sleep routes there only while tutorial is incomplete.
Прокинутися / /wake exits the tutorial dream and restores a valid real-world location.
/tutorialReset [character] lets scribes clear tutorial completion and reset the saved dream tutorial position to the start.
The player's own /me view should mention when the tutorial dream is not yet complete.
Visible locked exits appear in exit lists and block movement with a reason; queued movement re-checks locks before completion.

Брама Сну is the first interactive gate: /say Відчинитися / Сказати «Відчинитися» opens the south exit with a cycling 30s, 1m, 2m, 4m, 8m window; /open / Відкрити may remain as compatibility aliases; slow tutorial pace comments use the same reminder rhythm.
